title: croton urophyllus
intro: Croton urophyllus, also known as the 'Nagale' or 'Urophylle', is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of India, Sri Lanka, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Croton urophyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or consumed as remedies for various ailments.
